title: Hierarchy of Key Business Metrics in a Data Warehouse
description: A visual breakdown showing how raw data from source systems is transformed into key business metrics (facts) and organized for analytical reporting.
relationships: Data is Extracted from Source Systems and Loaded into the Data Warehouse
Data is Transformed and Modeled into a Dimensional Schema with Fact and Dimension Tables
Fact Tables store the Quantitative Metrics (e.g., Sales Revenue, Units Sold)
Metrics are aggregated and served to BI Tools for analysis
BI Tools visualize the Key Metrics on Dashboards and Reports for business users
